dimensions.label: Commercial Teaching
dimensions.description: Did the rep share a unique insight that reframes how the prospect thinks about their problem?

dimensions.label: Tailoring the Message
dimensions.description: Did the rep adapt their pitch to the prospect's specific role, industry, and priorities?

dimensions.label: Taking Control
dimensions.description: Did the rep assertively guide the conversation, push back constructively, and maintain momentum?

dimensions.label: Constructive Tension
dimensions.description: Did the rep respectfully challenge the prospect's assumptions to create urgency?

dimensions.label: Value Articulation
dimensions.description: Did the rep clearly connect their solution to quantified business outcomes?
